executives.name: Masayoshi Son
executives.background: Masayoshi Son is the Chairman of our board of directors. He is the Founder, Chairman and CEO of SoftBank Group Corp. He has served on our board since 2016.

executives.name: Xiaopeng He
executives.background: Mr. He is our co-founder, executive director, chairman of the board of directors and chief executive officer. Prior to founding our company, Mr. He served as the president of Alibaba Mobile Business Group and was in charge of the mobile browser, mobile search, and location-based services. He co-founded UCWeb Inc. in 2004 and served as its president.

tenure_dates.title: President of Alibaba Mobile Business Group (also served as President of UCWeb, Chairman of Ali Games, and President of Tudou)
